assertions: The strategy JSON block is present and contains keys: input, padded, tile, pad_impl, strategy_source, estimated_execution_us, estimated_total_us, confidence
The proposed padded M, N, K are each members of the respective ALLOWED lists
The padded dims are all >= the input dims (Mp >= 300, Np >= 500, Kp >= 700)
The tile (m, n, k) evenly divides the padded shape
Phase 4 writes or attempts to write to memory/gemm-data/runs.json
A session log file is created or attempted in memory/sessions/
